name: Lemon Kiss Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together the butter and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add the lemon extract and mix until well combined.
3. Gradually add the flour and chopped almonds, stirring at low speed until fully incorporated.
4. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for 1 hour.
5. Shape tablespoon portions of dough around each candy kiss, covering completely.
6. Roll the shaped dough in your hands to form a ball.
7. Place the cookies on ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly golden.
9. Allow the cookies to cool completely before removing them from the sheet.
10. Sprinkle the cooled cookies with powdered sugar.
11. Melt the chocolate chips and shortening together over low heat.
12. Drizzle the melted mixture over the cooled cookies.
13. Serve approximately 6 dozen cookies.
